---
title: "Foster"
---

# Why foster with us?

## Rescue cats most in need.
Our organization only rescues community cats -- cats from the most dangerous, resource-poor environments. 

## We provide everything.
Our foster caregivers receive food, litter, supplies, and veterinary care for foster cats at no cost.

## Exclusive foster perks.
We offer discounted basic veterinary care for your personal cats, including vaccines, microchipping, and more.

## Become part of a community.
Our volunteer network is made up of diverse, supportive, cat-loving people all around Cleveland.

Fill out our foster interest form to learn more!

[Foster Interest Form](https://form.jotform.com/232267278145157){.main-button}

```{=html}
<div class="jotform-wrapper">

<iframe
  id="JotFormIFrame-233584882215159"
  title="Request Form"
  allowtransparency="true"
  allow="geolocation; microphone; camera; fullscreen"
  src="https://form.jotform.com/232267278145157"
  frameborder="0"
  style="
    min-width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    height:1200px;
    border:none;
  "
  scrolling="no">
</iframe>

</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
var ifr = document.getElementById("JotFormIFrame-233584882215159");

if (ifr) {
  window.addEventListener("message", function(e) {
    if (typeof e.data === 'string' && e.data.indexOf("setHeight") > -1) {
      var height = e.data.split(":")[1];
      ifr.style.height = height + "px";
    }
  }, false);
}
</script>
```
